about_subtitle: This is an internal learning and workflow platform for BIM teams. It brings together materials that help teams adopt standards faster and keep project quality consistent.
about_values_practical_text: Content and tools for daily work of designers and BIM teams without unnecessary theory.
about_values_transparent_text: Unified content structure, clear scenarios, and consistent logic across all project pages.
about_values_growth_text: The platform is continuously updated with new videos, instructions, templates, and learning collections.
about_available_text: All key tools and knowledge are collected in one place to speed up training and day-to-day workflows.
about_features_1: Video tutorials and webinars for Revit, Civil 3D, and AutoCAD
about_features_2: Navigation by sections: EIR, Instructions, Videos, Library, Tests
about_features_3: Filtering and quick search for needed materials
about_features_4: Single workspace for engineers, BIM managers, and administrators
about_cta_text: Start in the Videos section for onboarding, then open Instructions and Library to apply practices in your project.
